content:
IVX ENTERPRISE TIME ZONE SYSTEM

OBJECTIVE

Implement a complete enterprise time zone architecture across IVX Holdings.

TIME STANDARD

• Store ALL timestamps in UTC only.
• Never store local device times in the database.
• Convert UTC → local timezone only when displaying data.

AUTO DETECTION

On login and registration automatically detect:

• IANA timezone (America/New_York, Europe/London, etc.)
• UTC offset
• Country
• Region
• Language
• 12h/24h preference

Save these values in the user's profile.

DATABASE

Add profile fields:

timezone
utc_offset
country
region
locale
last_timezone_update

CHAT

Display message timestamps using the viewer's timezone.

Investor in California:
9:00 AM PST

Owner in Florida:
12:00 PM EST

Same UTC timestamp.

OWNER DASHBOARD

Add Time Zone Settings.

Options:

✓ UTC
✓ Owner Time
✓ User Time
✓ Property Time
✓ Custom Time Zone

REPORTS

Allow switching between:

• UTC
• Local Time
• Server Time

AUDIT LOGS

Always store UTC.

Show:

UTC
Local Time
Time Zone
Offset
Device

TRANSACTIONS

Convert all:

Investor deposits
Wallet activity
Revenue
JV Deals
Fees
Withdrawals
Notifications
Messages
Analytics

to UTC storage.

LANDING PAGE

Record:

Registration time
Lead submission
Video view
Property inquiry

in UTC.

MOBILE

Expo
Android
iOS
Web

must all use the same time service.

DST

Automatically support Daylight Saving Time.

No manual adjustment.

TESTS

Verify:

✓ New York
✓ Miami
✓ California
✓ London
✓ Madrid
✓ Dubai
✓ Tokyo
✓ Sydney

Verify timestamps before and after DST transitions.

DEPLOY

Deploy to production.

Provide:

• GitHub SHA
• Render Deploy ID
• Health endpoint
• QA report
• Screenshots
• Evidence that all timestamps are stored in UTC and displayed correctly in each user's local timezone.
